name: DERMATOFIBROSARCOMA PROTUBERANS
definition: uncommon spindle cell tumor arising in dermis typically spreading into subcutaneous tissue +
dominant_finding: well-defined nodular subcutaneous lesion without calcification
discriminating_features: well-defined nodular subcutaneous lesion without calcification
hyperintense relative to fat on T2WI

CT: well-defined nodular subcutaneous lesion without calcification
MR: hyperintense relative to fat on T2WI
± heterogeneous foci of hemorrhage, myxoid change, necrosis
